description: Information security management system. SidClaw directly supports Annex A access control, logging, and change management controls through Identity, Policy, Approval, and Trace primitives.

mapping.title: Access control
sidclaw_features: Agent registry with owner, team, environment, and delegation model per agent
Policy-per-tool-call enforcement (every action is authorized against explicit rules)
RBAC + API key scopes limit human and machine access

mapping.title: Identity management
sidclaw_features: Unique agent identities with cryptographic authentication (API keys with SHA-256 hashed storage)
Identity resolution event at the start of every audit trace
Lifecycle states: active / suspended / revoked

mapping.title: Authentication information
sidclaw_features: API keys in `ai_` + 32-hex-byte format, hashed at rest
OIDC support (Okta, Auth0, Google) for human auth
Session cookies with CSRF protection

mapping.title: Privileged access rights
sidclaw_features: Authority model per agent (self / delegated / none)
Separation of duties enforcement — agent owner cannot approve their own agent's actions
Last-admin protection on user deletion

mapping.title: Logging
sidclaw_features: Every tool call creates a hash-chained audit trace
Every audit event contains: timestamp, actor, description, status, integrity_hash
Tamper-evident — /traces/:id/verify recomputes and compares the chain

mapping.title: Monitoring activities
sidclaw_features: Behavioral drift detection with webhook alerts on anomalies
Dashboard analytics: action volume, risk distribution, approval rates
Webhook events for policy_violation, approval_decided, trace.completed

mapping.title: Test information
sidclaw_features: Dry-run policy testing (evaluate against a policy without executing)
Policy version history allows testing proposed changes before activation

mapping.title: System change control procedures (ISO 27001:2013 retained reference)
sidclaw_features: PolicyRuleVersion — every policy edit creates a new version with modified_by
GitHub Action for deployment governance with Check Run approvals
